source: Etherscan-verified contracts (getsourcecode ContractName) + on-chain reads (sUSDe.asset()/silo()) — 1st-party. Ethena docs (docs.ethena.fi) do not publish a machine-readable address page; addresses verified directly on-chain.
note: Ethena on Ethereum mainnet (chainId 1) — representative-chain onboarding. SCOPE: sUSDe (StakedUSDeV2) ERC4626 staking vault — the user stake/cooldown/unstake lifecycle (the cooldown-gated withdrawal is the permission-relevant pre-sign flow). USDe = base stablecoin, user surface = standard ERC-20/2612 (covered by erc20 standard adapter); no protocol-specific user action → exclude here. EXCLUDE: EthenaMinting (whitelisted market-maker RFQ, EIP-712 Order — not retail), USDeSilo (infra holding cooled funds), admin/role/blacklist/rewards-funding. DEFER (out of this scope, separate onboarding): ENA / sENA staking, USDtb, LayerZero OFT multichain (= multichain expansion, separate framework).

contracts.name: StakedUSDeV2 (sUSDe)
contracts.reason: primary user surface: ERC4626 stake (deposit/mint) + user-initiated cooldown (cooldownShares/cooldownAssets) + post-cooldown unstake + ERC4626 redeem. Cooldown-gated withdrawal is the pre-sign permission flow.

contracts.name: USDe (synthetic dollar)
contracts.reason: base stablecoin; user surface = standard ERC-20 + EIP-2612 permit (erc20 standard adapter auto-enumerate, out of this gate). mint/burn = EthenaMinting MINTER-role infra. No protocol-specific user action.

contracts.name: EthenaMinting
contracts.reason: USDe mint/redeem via whitelisted market-maker RFQ (EIP-712 Order, BENEFACTOR/MINTER roles). Not a retail pre-sign surface — permissioned infra.

contracts.name: USDeSilo (sUSDe cooldown silo)
contracts.reason: infra: holds USDe in cooldown on behalf of StakedUSDeV2; only sUSDe (the vault) calls it. No direct user surface.
